output.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    k.ebeln AS po_number,
    k.lifnr AS vendor,
    k.bedat AS po_date,
    k.ekorg AS purchasing_org,
    p.ebelp AS item,
    p.matnr AS material,
    p.menge AS quantity,
    p.netpr AS unit_price,
    p.menge * p.netpr AS line_value
FROM mm.ekko k
JOIN mm.ekpo p ON k.ebeln = p.ebeln
ORDER BY k.ebeln, p.ebelp

FROM mm.ekko k
JOIN mm.ekpo p ON k.ebeln = p.ebeln
ORDER BY k.ebeln, p.ebelp
